application-shell.reason: Existing route, permission, search, theme, and account owner.

sidebar.reason: Existing shadcn-compatible responsive and collapse behavior.

page-card.reason: Standard page title, action, toolbar, and compact content hierarchy for list and management routes.

page-header.reason: Standard compact heading owner for dashboard, overview, status, profile, and route-status surfaces.

metric-card.reason: Monitoring and analytics had duplicated metric presentation with two real consumers.

data-state.reason: Single loading, empty, error, permission, and processing vocabulary for pages and tables.

data-table-shell.reason: Existing table surface consumes the shared light and dark semantic tokens.

table-pagination.reason: Shared pagination layout and navigation semantics.

form-fields.reason: Existing label, error, input, and description ownership.

theme-system.reason: The existing provider remains the only state and persistence owner; the existing stylesheet remains the only semantic token owner while themes converge to light and dark.

login.reason: Reuse the existing auth route and form contract while replacing the marketing composition with a compact sign-in surface.

dashboard.reason: Existing real dashboard API and loading/error states.

cards-and-tables.reason: The existing component system remains authoritative while shared padding, radius, shadow, and solid surfaces become denser and more restrained.
